{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324093754AB0F4501085B54A0DEB7\"}"},"total":15070},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7114702510086193957","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在任何小说网里都能称得上精品，故事另辟蹊径，引人入胜，主角有勇有谋。既不是单纯的硬杀硬刚，又不犹犹豫豫，做事有目的有头脑，该出手时就展现狠辣，该避锋芒时又能藏拙。就是更新太少"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1656521000,"group_id":"7077484691040766991","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"老牛亦解韶光贵,不待扬鞭自奋蹄.","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2FsdQqoegV8ufOkx4tbhJ47S9wpNbb7sQqm5EEXtkHQ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776878784\u0026x-signature=ERVL9Rcfar7EvAmuYrjtVsb%2FAZk%3D","user_id":"2660446501867229","user_name":"山铭河"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2660446501867229","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1659260397,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7077484691040766991","book_info":{"abstract":"【神话版大明】+【架空历史】+【高武】+【大明】+【无系统】杨凡穿越大明朝，化身一名小太监，亲眼目睹波澜壮阔的人间大世！千载王朝，不朽世家，江湖群雄，匹夫大豪，龙蛇并起！既然如此，那我，杨凡，要做那天下第一人！踏破云霄，绝世无敌！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/02e8b7d0489c714fcc3f63932b0ba5c6","author":"初九元十","author_id":"","book_id":"7077484691040766991","book_name":"高武大明：从小太监到九千岁","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"16.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":126,\"name\":\"明朝\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=126\u0026name=明朝\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7077495858413077005","read_count":"163785","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"6130676"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"2935","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,明朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bf1ff047087430c6617fb179d2285f4c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779500274\u0026x-signature=XHOkgeO30RYduel%2BBhC%2FfCu7uJM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"67292115154","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.6157129e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324093754AB0F4501085B54A0DEB7\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读25小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":122,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":43971,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":90127,"reply_count":11,"show_pv":227353},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1656555594,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7104461794051441447","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很奈斯。很好看，感觉很新颖。这是我看过这类小说最好看之一的一本。没有系统艰苦修炼。一步一步往上爬，从小人物崛起。真的很好看，作者加油，希望一直连载下去更新不要停啊。如果每天能更新4~5章就好了😃😃😃"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1654136447,"group_id":"7077484691040766991","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我在等你，在灯火阑珊处","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyyTt+bvmXjdg6OjS6Idr0ivwPbjTbKL4jy/AEgTwaIU","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a40a39eff8b448f1bfb49f6dfd7d726a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776879314\u0026x-signature=ueBhJjuRGkBMtbS0i4%2F5wYTMmRI%3D","user_id":"3931494368939775","user_name":"等待黎明的朝阳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3931494368939775","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1656943189,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7077484691040766991","book_info":{"abstract":"【神话版大明】+【架空历史】+【高武】+【大明】+【无系统】杨凡穿越大明朝，化身一名小太监，亲眼目睹波澜壮阔的人间大世！千载王朝，不朽世家，江湖群雄，匹夫大豪，龙蛇并起！既然如此，那我，杨凡，要做那天下第一人！踏破云霄，绝世无敌！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/02e8b7d0489c714fcc3f63932b0ba5c6","author":"初九元十","author_id":"","book_id":"7077484691040766991","book_name":"高武大明：从小太监到九千岁","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"16.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"
